channel.title: Short version of --dont-open-browser
channel.description:
<!-- Please, follow this template to be as efficient as possible. Before opening a new feature, please check that it hasn't been already added. -->
# Description <!-- Try to give a detailed explanation of what do you expect of this feature --> The `--dont-open-browser` flag in `npx frontity dev` is very long to type out. Using commands should be as short and efficient as possible.
# Possible solution <!-- If you have already thought of a possible solution, let us know! --> Add a `-d`, or similar terse version, as an alternative to the `--dont-open-browser` flag.

item.title: Short version of --dont-open-browser
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
We have some untested and undocumented support for the BROWSER env variable so it makes sense

Read full topic

item.title: Short version of --dont-open-browser
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
SantosGuillamot:

use this same flag to open different browsers

I like this idea!

Read full topic

item.title: Short version of --dont-open-browser
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Would it makes sense to use --browser none? I mean, if you don’t use that flag it would use the default browser, but maybe it’s also interesting in the future to be able to use this same flag to open different browsers if wanted.

I’ve seen that Create React App has an environment variable for something similar, and I thought it could be interesting.

Read full topic

item.title: Short version of --dont-open-browser
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
We have --no-prompt. Maybe this could be renamed to --no-browser?

Read full topic

item.title: Short version of --dont-open-browser
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
I agree --dont-open-browser could be a bit long. However, @luisherranz just merged a Pull Request to get rid of all the short flags in the CLI because they weren’t consistent, so I wouldn’t use -d until we agree on a standardize way to create them. Do you know how other tools are doing it? I guess this is a typical flag.

Read full topic

item.title: Short version of --dont-open-browser
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Description

The --dont-open-browser flag in npx frontity dev is very long to type out. Using commands should be as short and efficient as possible.

Possible solution

Add a -d, or similar terse version, as an alternative to the --dont-open-browser flag.

Read full topic
